title: Resident Evil 3
subtitle: Remake (the video game)
review: This is a bit like the sewers and laboratories from {Resident Evil 2}, the weaker parts of the previous remake, and it's missing the police station style of navigation, backtracking and puzzle solving. It also has just as many weapons and items, but because it's much shorter, you find new weapons too quickly. This reduces the sense of satisfaction compared to a the more gradual power curve of 2, where upgrades feel more earned. Still, the action gameplay is very fun, Jill is a good character, and the boss fights are an improvement over 2. The original game on the PlayStation was a rushed sequel that disappointed players a little when it was new, and now the remake is the same. Even worse is the amount of cut content in this remake and its short length as a result. It's only worth it if you can get it cheaply, otherwise there are better games in the series to play first.
